description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof, featuring a mix of light wood paneling and dark shingle trim along the roofline. The front facade is punctuated by several doors and windows, with a prominent entryway sheltered by a small overhang. Large, grid-style windows are present on the shorter ends of the building, providing ample natural light to the interior. The roof includes a combination of a dark, possibly tarred section and a lighter, open area with visible rooftop utilities and a small terrace. The structure sits on a flat base, suggesting it is designed for urban placement, such as along a street or in a residential neighborhood. The overall aesthetic is clean and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional design.
description: A modern, single-story rectangular bungalow with flat roof, light wood paneling, and large grid windows. Features a mix of dark and light roof sections and a clean, urban design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main entrance, multiple doors, and windows along the light wood facade, with a dark shingle roof trim.
description_view_1: End view highlighting two large grid-style windows and the dark roof section, with the entryway less visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying more windows and doors, rooftop utilities, and the lighter roof terrace area.
description_view_3: Rear view with minimal fenestration, a single window, and a clear view of the rooftop terrace and utility structures.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grid windows on ends and scattered side windows
